archetype: 3 (Pastel & Soft) modified with Neo-Brutalist Hard Edges

core_principles.corners: CRITICAL: NO rounded corners anywhere. Use `rounded-none` or `borderRadius: 0` exclusively. Every button, card, input, and modal MUST be perfectly rectangular with sharp 90-degree corners.
core_principles.language: CRITICAL: Interface MUST be 100% in Spanish.
core_principles.color_psychology: Light, bright (colores claros) but structured. Use a stark white/off-white background with highly saturated pastel accent colors to designate different functions, bounded by hard black/dark-slate borders for contrast.
core_principles.shadows: Hard, offset geometric shadows (e.g., `4px 4px 0px #0F172A`) to emphasize the sharp UI instead of soft blurs.
core_principles.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e-g., `data-testid="login-button"`, `data-testid="anki-good-btn"`).

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFD93D] text-slate-900 border-2 border-slate-900 rounded-none shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F172A] active:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#0F172A] active:translate-y-[2px] active:translate-x-[2px] transition-all font-bold uppercase tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border-2 border-slate-900 rounded-none shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F172A] active:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#0F172A] transition-all font-bold
buttons.anki_again: bg-[#FF6B6B] text-white border-2 border-slate-900 rounded-none font-bold
buttons.anki_hard: bg-[#FFB84C] text-slate-900 border-2 border-slate-900 rounded-none font-bold
buttons.anki_good: bg-[#28C76F] text-slate-900 border-2 border-slate-900 rounded-none font-bold
buttons.anki_easy: bg-[#4D96FF] text-white border-2 border-slate-900 rounded-none font-bold
buttons.google_login: bg-white text-slate-900 border-2 border-slate-900 rounded-none shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F172A] flex items-center justify-center gap-3 py-4

inputs.standard: bg-white border-2 border-slate-900 rounded-none px-4 py-3 text-slate-900 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F172A] transition-all

cards.standard: bg-white border-2 border-slate-900 rounded-none p-6 shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0F172A]
cards.flashcard: bg-white border-4 border-slate-900 rounded-none p-8 min-h-[350px] flex flex-col justify-center items-center text-center shadow-[8px_8px_0px_#0F172A]

login.layout: Centered flex layout. Abstract pastel background overlay.
elements: Subtext explaining the Anki spaced-repetition value proposition

dashboard_flashcards.layout: Single card focus taking up 70% of viewport. Anki controls docked at the bottom.
elements: 4-button SM-2 row (Again, Hard, Good, Easy) visible ONLY after revealing

calendar.layout: Strict square grid. No rounded highlight pills for days—use solid square color blocks for days with events.
elements: List of events below the selected date

event_form.layout: Standard form. Reminder: No year field allowed, only Day, Month, Name, Type (Birthday/Anniversary).

settings.layout: List layout with hard dividers (2px black borders).

login_background.description: Smooth blend of pastel colors in a vertical gradient pattern. Use as a subtle background behind the login screen with a white opacity overlay if needed.

festive_confetti.description: Colorful confetti on a white background. Use this on the Festive Flashcard for birthdays to give it a celebratory vibe.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The entire UI must be in Spanish. Translating component texts is mandatory.
CRITICAL: Avoid `borderRadius` entirely. Use `borderRadius: 0` or `rounded-none`. We are implementing a 'sharp' Neo-Brutalist look.
CRITICAL: Date inputs should NEVER collect or display the year. Only day and month.
Use standard React Native / Expo components, but style them with strict borders (2px or 4px solid #0F172A) and hard offset box-shadows to match the design language.
Include 'data-testid' on every button, input, toggle, and key text element.
Implement the Anki spaced repetition interface precisely: show Question first, then a 'Reveal Answer' button, then show the 4 SM2 buttons (Again, Hard, Good, Easy) replacing the reveal button.
For the Calendar view, use a simple grid layout with strict square styling, no rounded selections.
